steps.title: Give the historians' reason
steps.content: The student must specify why historians believe Cole designed most of Duke's campus buildings. The notes give the reason: the buildings used Gregorian and neo-Gothic styles, and Cole had studied those styles in Europe.

steps.title: Require the style link
steps.content: Choice B states the belief but not the reason. Choice C mentions the styles and the firm, but not why historians attribute the designs to Cole. Choice D identifies Cole's background but does not explain the inference. The remaining choice makes the style-based reasoning explicit. The answer is A.
